analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet asserts that the UN Security Council has not acted to reinstate sanctions on Iran and criticizes the US for allegedly speaking on behalf of the Council, urging it to face the truth. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile/decadent) – Yes. The tweet portrays the US as overreaching and misleading ("speaking on behalf of the Security Council") and lacking courage to face the truth, casting the US negatively as an improper, hostile actor. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – No. While it references multilateralism (UNSC), it does not highlight Russia promoting an alternative system or non-Western cooperation. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner) – No. No claim about Russia aiding peace or partnership. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – No historical content. RU5 (Russia at the forefront) – No showcase of Russian achievements. RU6 (Russia culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1 only.
